channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lime bike, 18th July
item.description:
Lime bike abandoned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Brodrick Grove, Abbey Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree fallen on path, only avoidance is directly into main road and around it, 18th July
item.description:
Large tree blocking entire walkway, only alternative is to cross informally, or go into busy main road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maidstone Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge blocking pavement, 18th July
item.description:
Dumped fridge blocking pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rodway Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dip in road, 18th July
item.description:
Noticeable dip in the road - 10cm - which is causing considerable risk of damage to vehicles and could cause a bad accident if f a motorcycle is involved.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16-17, Crystal Palace Parade, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 18th July
item.description:
Most of the rubbish were emptied from the one of the garages

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Red Mazda has been crashed into., 18th July
item.description:
There is what looks to be an abandoned red Mazda 6 outside no. 9/11 on Bramblebury Rd. it’s been there for a few years but I assumed it was getting used. However recently someone has clipped the front left corner and it’s now at a funny angle pointing into the road and hasn’t been touched in around 3 weeks. Will need to be collected as it will be causing problems with the bin lorrys trying to get down the road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bramblebury Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant litter at new bike station, 18th July
item.description:
The new bike station and railings at the bottom of Glenarm Road is always full of litter and attracts it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenarm Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement o/s 91 Dartmouth Road NW2, 18th July
item.description:
Two mattresses dumped on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dartmouth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Graffiti on brick wall, 18th July
item.description:
Vost tag. Put there Thursday night.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish by bins, 18th July
item.description:
So much rubbish it will fill a truck And you want to add more house with more waste

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Valley Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Heavily stained pavement, 18th July
item.description:
Really dirty pavement, due to rubbish not being cleared regularly. Please arrange a deep clean or pressure wash.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenworthy Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cushions dumped, 18th July
item.description:
Sponge cushions in pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Stradella Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A small deep sinkhole in the road surface, 18th July
item.description:
This has been present for several days and is getting deeper. Someone (I don’t think Greenwich Council ) has painted it with obvious white lines because it so dangerous to all vehicles and bicycles. It needs to be repaired as a matter of extreme urgency before it gets any bigger, causes damage to tyres and cause accidents.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Park Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working now for over 2 years!, 18th July
item.description:
Street light needs fixing, it’s a health and safety issue and neither the council or development management have done anything about it in over 2 years. Shocking level of service
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Morris Drive, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin number two on Fraser road, 18th July
item.description:
Another bin on Fraser Road this time this bin is constantly overflowing. There is even rubbish on top of the bus stop. Whole area here needs a good clean up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fraser Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping trolley dumped, 18th July
item.description:
Shopping trolley dumped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Freta Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 18th July
item.description:
Bin overflowing by the bus stop outside Wickes. Inaccessible to vehicles due to road closures but the road is open to pedestrians still and the bin needs emptying plus rubbish on floor will cause rats etc

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fraser Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dump by bins, 18th July
item.description:
Too may people who can’t be bothered to look after our space And you want more people to live in Bromley

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 18th July
item.description:
Rubbish has been dumped on Borthwick Street near to the primary school and side of Twinkle Park

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Borthwick Street, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Settee and large boxes left by the bin, 18th July
item.description:
Someone has abandoned settees and large boxes at the back of the shops on old Dover Road , side of kebab shop and flower shop, and butchers . Boxes have an address in but as per this app I have not included it . It was abandoned over night .

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stratheden Parade, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet
